title: Sous-Vide Protein Stuffed Pancakes
description: A savory and dense Slovakian dish featuring white flour, sous-vide cooked eggs stuffed inside a pancake batter.
instructions: Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
Beat eggs well. Gradually add beaten eggs into the dry ingredients while mixing until smooth.
Heat butter or oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Form small doughnuts with egg mixture and place them in the preheated pan for about 2-3 minutes on each side, using a spatula to prevent sticking.
Place stuffed eggs into the sous-vide machine at 158°F (70°C) for approximately 4 hours or until fully cooked.
Remove from sous-vide and serve with desired sauces as an accompaniment.
